title: Supreme Court Collegium recommends appointment of three judicial officers as judges of AP High Court
description: The Supreme Court Collegium has recommended the appointment of three judicial officers as judges of the Andhra Pradesh High Court.The decision was taken at a meeting of the Collegium held on Monday.The officers recommended for elevation are:Sunitha Gandham;Alapati Giridhar; andPurushottam Kumar Chintalapudi @ Ch. Purushottama Kumar.[Read Collegium Statement]Supreme Court Collegium recommends appointment of three judicial officers as judges of AP High Court https://t.co/4ZKviGYUZt— Bar and
